description_long: This figure depicts an adult human with a bald head and a menacing, mask-like face. The individual is dressed in a loose-fitting, short-sleeved shirt and matching pants, both of which are heavily stained or soiled, especially around the chest and upper back. The exposed skin on the arms and head appears mottled or damaged, giving a distressed or possibly undead appearance. The hands are elongated and darkened, contributing to an unsettling, horror-themed aesthetic. The overall posture is rigid, with arms extended horizontally, and the figure exudes an eerie, intimidating presence suitable for a suspenseful urban scenario.
description: A bald adult figure in loose, stained clothing with a mask-like face and distressed skin, arms outstretched in a rigid pose. The appearance is unsettling and horror-themed, with darkened hands and soiled garments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, soiled upper back, and the full length of the loose pants.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the mottled skin on the head and arm, and the straight drape of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the mask-like face, heavily stained chest, and outstretched arms with darkened hands.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the damaged skin and the side of the face mask.
attribute_clothing_type: loose short-sleeved shirt and loose pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms outstretched horizontally
